title: Add getDepositAddr backend function

requirements.text: Add a public query/update function `getDepositAddr` to the backend actor in `backend/main.mo` that performs an inter-canister call to `getDepositAccount` on canister `5u2c6-kyaaa-aaaar-qadiq-cai`, passing the bot canister's own principal as the argument, and returns the result. Do not change any other existing logic.

quotes: Adiciona ao backend uma função pública getDepositAddr que chama getDepositAccount no canister 5u2c6-kyaaa-aaaar-qadiq-cai passando o principal do próprio canister. Não alteres mais nada.

acceptanceCriteria: A public function named `getDepositAddr` exists in `backend/main.mo`.
The argument passed to `getDepositAccount` is the bot canister's own principal (obtained via `Principal.fromActor(this)` or equivalent).
The function returns the result from the inter-canister call.
No other existing functions, state variables, or logic in `backend/main.mo` are modified.

constraints: Do not modify any existing backend functions or state.
Do not modify any frontend files.
Do not alter backend/migration.mo unless strictly necessary.
nonGoals: Adding a frontend button or UI for this function.
Implementing depositCkBTC or any ckBTC transfer logic.
Auditing or cleaning up backend/frontend code.
